changelog:
v3.2 is here!
- [New] Automatic Pictures subfolder sorting for all platforms (TikTok, Instagram, Facebook, Pinterest).
- [New] Save long captions (> 50 chars) in matching .txt files.
- [New] Lifetime downloads counter shown in Dashboard.
- [New] Cookies text direct copy-paste option.
- [New] 7-day automatic cookies validity cleanup.
